titles.title: Ain't Nothin Better Than Being There

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well Jesus is gone away to prepare for me a place. He has built, for me a home beyond the sky I'll be ready for that day when my soul shall fly away to that mansion waiting over on the other side.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Heaven's gates are made of pearl, there's nothing like it in this world. For foundations; they are made on precious stones And finally on that day I'll see my Savior face to face I'm gonna lift my hands and shout around the throne

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This world has many pains and miseries to give but I've a blessed hope waiting for me When it's all been said and done and my race has been won A crown of glory's laid up just for me.
